sn47.20:2.1: The introduction to Ja 96 quotes from this Sutta.
sn47.20:2.2: Janapadakalyāṇī is typically rendered as “the most beautiful lady in the land”, but here we see her talents as a dazzling singer and dancer. While she was famed for her beauty (Ud 3.2:9.1), the word kalyāṇa normally means “(morally) good, fine, lovely” and does not refer solely to her appearance.
